title: U.S. Begins a Blockade of the Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: European countries declined to take part in the action, which is designed to pressure Iran into making concessions by cutting off its oil income.
summary_public: European countries declined to take part in the action, which is designed to pressure Iran into making concessions by cutting off its oil income.
